question: What is the definition of the acronym RVV?

nuscale_ch01_0013.title: Proprietary Information
nuscale_ch01_0013.summary: This section explains the organization and identification of text, tables, figures, and page numbering within the NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report (FSAR). It also clarifies that while the FSAR does not contain proprietary or safeguards information, some sensitive content is withheld from public disclosure in accordance with regulations, and a separate public version is provided with such material removed.

nuscale_ch01_0014.title: Acronyms and Abbreviations
nuscale_ch01_0014.summary: This section explains the conventions used for identifying and numbering tables, figures, and pages within the NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report (FSAR), as well as the handling of proprietary and sensitive information. It clarifies that sensitive material is withheld from public disclosure and is clearly marked, with a separate public version of the FSAR provided.

edges.description: Section B is expected to contain the list or definitions of acronyms such as RVV, which is the information sought in the analysis question, while Section A provides general introductory and formatting information without defining acronyms.
